name: part_010
file: tmp_【#Myth5years】hololive English -Myth- 5th Anniversary Concert： Fortune Spinner [HT_HUFi8DJ4]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_010.webm

scenes.description: The members of hololive English -Myth- give their final closing remarks after the concert performance.
A special announcement video showcasing the 5th Anniversary merchandise collection.
Closing cards featuring handwritten messages from Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, and Ninomae Ina'nis.

subtitles.original: ...gonna give up yet because, because...

subtitles.english: ...I'd like to think that we're not gonna give up yet

subtitles.english: Merch please!

subtitles.original: Ta-da! The merch announcement!
subtitles.english: Ta-da! The merch announcement!

subtitles.original: 次は、グッズのお知らせです！
subtitles.english: Next is the merchandise announcement!

subtitles.original: ホロライブEnglish -Myth- 5周年記念グッズが発売されます！
subtitles.english: We have hololive English -Myth- 5th Anniversary Celebration merch being released!

subtitles.original: 詳細を見ていきましょう。チェックしてね！
subtitles.english: Let's look at the details. Check it out!

subtitles.original: まずは、ミラーアクリルパネルです。
subtitles.english: First up, we've got the Mirror Acrylic Panel.

subtitles.original: イラストの周囲や背景が金属質の鏡のような雰囲気になっています。
subtitles.english: It's designed so that the surroundings and background of the illustration have a metallic mirrored vibe.

subtitles.original: うわぁ、すごくかっこいい！このイラスト、本当に大好きです。
subtitles.english: Uh, so cool! I absolutely love this illustration.

subtitles.original: 皆さんも気に入ってくれると嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: Hope you guys do too.

subtitles.original: 次は、コレクションカードです。
subtitles.english: Next up, we have the collection cards.

subtitles.original: これらのカードは光沢のあるメタリック仕上げで、3種類のデザインから選べます。
subtitles.english: These cards feature a shiny metallic finish, and you can choose from three different designs.

subtitles.original: また、裏面は全員でお揃いのデザインになっています。
subtitles.english: Also, the backside is matching for us all.

subtitles.original: 推しのカードをぜひ手に入れてくださいね！
subtitles.english: Make sure to get the one from your oshi for sure!

subtitles.original: 次は、コインメダルです。
subtitles.english: Next up, we have the coin medals.

subtitles.original: ピカピカの5周年記念コインメダル！
subtitles.english: Our shiny 5th anniversary commemorative coin medals!

subtitles.original: メンバーごとに1つのデザインがあり、裏面は共通のデザインになっています。
subtitles.english: There's one design for each member, and the back side also has a common design.

subtitles.original: オリジナルのパッケージに入った、アンティーク調の金メッキ仕上げです。
subtitles.english: They come in an antique gold-plated finish inside the original packaging.

subtitles.original: わぁ、すごくキラキラしてる！
subtitles.english: Ooh, so shiny!

subtitles.original: わぁ、どれも良さそうですね！でも、次に紹介するものに特に注目しています。
subtitles.english: Oh man, everything looks so good! But I'm especially interested in what we have to show you guys next.

subtitles.original: 次は、アニバーサリーハットです！
subtitles.english: Next up, we have the anniversary hats!

subtitles.original: まずは、アニバーサリーハット - 森カリオペ。
subtitles.english: So first up, Anniversary Hat - Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: 柔らかくてふわふわした生地を使っています。
subtitles.english: This one uses a soft, fluffy fabric.

subtitles.original: デス先生の部分は取り外し可能なので、なしで被ることもできます。
subtitles.english: The Death Sensei part is removable, so you can also rock it without him.

subtitles.original: ぜひチェックしてください、すごくスタイリッシュです！この形が大好きなんです。
subtitles.english: Make sure that you check it out, it's super stylish! I love the shape so much.

subtitles.original: メンバーのDead Beatsのみんなと一緒に投票で決めたので、皆さんに楽しんでもらいたいです！
subtitles.english: And all of my member Dead Beats voted on it together, so hope that you guys will enjoy!

subtitles.original: 次は私の！小鳥遊キアラのアニバーサリーハットです。
subtitles.english: Next up, we have mine! The anniversary hat from Takanashi Kiara.

subtitles.original: こんな感じです！装飾パーツは取り外し可能です。
subtitles.english: Looks like this! Decorative parts are removable.

subtitles.original: リバーシブル仕様で、裏返すと違う色になります！
subtitles.english: It can be worn reversibly, inside out, so you'll have a different color then!

subtitles.original: 今まで私にはなかったバケットハットのデザインです。すごくおしゃれですよ！
subtitles.english: And it's a bucket hat style design, which we didn't have before for me. Very fashionable, I must say!

subtitles.original: 最後は私の帽子！アニバーサリーハット - 一伊那尓栖。
subtitles.english: Last but not least, we have my hat! The Anniversary Hat - Ninomae Ina'nis.

subtitles.original: リボンの部分は取り外し可能で、パッチもすごく可愛いです。
subtitles.english: The ribbon part is removable, and the patches are super cute too.

subtitles.original: 被ればタコダチになれます！イエス！
subtitles.english: You can wear it to become Takodachi! Yes!

subtitles.original: リボンの有無で、色々なスタイルが楽しめます。
subtitles.english: And yeah, you can mix and match with or without the ribbon for different looks.

subtitles.original: 皆さん、ぜひグッズをチェックしてください！
subtitles.english: So everybody, be sure to check our merch out!

subtitles.original: これで5周年記念配信を終了します！
subtitles.english: And that concludes our 5th year anniversary stream!

subtitles.original: アルティメット・ミス！
subtitles.english: Ultimate Myth!

subtitles.original: Thank you for an unforgettable 5 years! I can't wait for even more amazing things in the future! Buckle in! It's going to be an exciting ride ahead!! GO NEXT!
subtitles.english: Thank you for an unforgettable 5 years! I can't wait for even more amazing things in the future! Buckle in! It's going to be an exciting ride ahead!! GO NEXT!

subtitles.original: Thanks for 5 years together, everyone! Are you ready for more?! It's already been the best journey a Reaper could ask for, but let's run forward into the future! I can't wait to see what the future holds for us and my Myth girls! Love you all! Goodbye for now!
subtitles.english: Thanks for 5 years together, everyone! Are you ready for more?! It's already been the best journey a Reaper could ask for, but let's run forward into the future! I can't wait to see what the future holds for us and my Myth girls! Love you all! Goodbye for now!

subtitles.original: Thank you all for being here! These 5 years were super crazy with so many ups & downs but looking back, the good and happy memories are so much more! Every moment shared together will forever stay deep in my heart and I'm looking forward for more! Love you all so much! KIKKERIKI!!!
subtitles.english: Thank you all for being here! These 5 years were super crazy with so many ups & downs but looking back, the good and happy memories are so much more! Every moment shared together will forever stay deep in my heart and I'm looking forward for more! Love you all so much! KIKKERIKI!!!
